title: The FIRST UFO Crash in the United States
summary: This interview discusses the Trinity UFO crash, which allegedly occurred in San Antonio, New Mexico in August 1945, just 20 days after the first atomic test. Two young witnesses, Remy Baca and Jose Padilla, reportedly observed a damaged metallic craft containing three humanoid creatures.

events.description: Trinity atomic test conducted in July at the Trinity test site in New Mexico
Alleged UFO crash in San Antonio, New Mexico, 20 days after the Trinity test and two days after Japanese concession

key_claims.claim: A metallic avocado-shaped object crashed in San Antonio, New Mexico, 20 days after the first atomic test on U.S. soil
The crash occurred two days after the Japanese concession
Two children, Remy Baca (age 7) and Jose Padilla (age 9), witnessed the crashed craft
The witnesses observed three humanoid creatures approximately three feet tall with two eyes, two arms, three fingers, and two legs inside the craft
The craft was damaged with one missing panel but maintained its integrity
